title: Assorted Jumping Crabs
description: The pack for your Jumping Crabs!
body:
![spark_server](https://i.imgur.com/UV1gvFp.jpg)

## ![](https://i.imgur.com/8FzB5ZN.png)

***

## Assorted Jumping Crabs is the perfect pack for your frogs, bringing a handful of high-quality custom crab variants that will bring joy to all Crab Ravers!

![Addon](https://imgur.com/oYpzoJf.png)
***
This pack requires the mentioned features marked below:

![Optifine or EMF/ETF](https://i.imgur.com/MS5KZjL.png)

  
![](https://i.imgur.com/AfRhw7z.png)

***

## These mob variants can all be renamed to their appropriate skin and can spawn naturally.  
The pack is formatted in a way that allows for easy creation of add-ons!

  
![A group of Allays!](https://i.imgur.com/77uwAfr.png)  
  
![](https://i.imgur.com/kMMMcRh.png483284/1086427549204226138/License.png)
